name: Infernal Pillows
outcome: While whispering sweet, seductive affirmations, Ceris lovingly strokes the back of your head with a powerful claw, and you eagerly lick and suck on her pert nipple, the warm pillowy softness of her breast filling your head with a hot needy haze.
miss: While whispering sweet, seductive affirmations, Ceris lovingly strokes the back of your head with a powerful claw, and you eagerly lick and suck on her pert nipple, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure the pleasure and not drink down any milk!
statusOutcome: The cozy, warm saftey of Ceris' hold on you leaves a blissful alluring heat spreading through you as you're left helplessly charmed with her.
